panels.description: Account creation timestamp from the boxel users table.

targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at FROM users WHERE matrix_user_id = ${matrix_user_id:sqlstring} LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Account Created

panels.description: Number of realms this user has at least one permission on.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS realms FROM realm_user_permissions WHERE username = ${matrix_user_id:sqlstring};

panels.title: Realms Accessible

panels.description: Stripe customer ID for billing — '—' if none.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(stripe_customer_id, '—') AS stripe_customer FROM users WHERE matrix_user_id = ${matrix_user_id:sqlstring} LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Stripe Customer

panels.description: Operator actions: grant extra credit to the selected user. Live balance + last grant are fetched from credits_ledger every refresh; the custom-amount button disables when the entered amount is non-positive. Each click POSTs with `Authorization: Bearer ${grafana_secret}` (substituted from SSM at apply time, CS-10929).

elements.title: User
elements.tooltip: Set via the "User ID" variable picker above.

elements.title: Remaining plan allowance
elements.tooltip: Plan-allowance credits left in the active subscription cycle (plan_allowance + plan_allowance_used, summed). Excludes extra credit.

elements.title: Remaining extra credit
elements.tooltip: Extra credit currently available (extra_credit + extra_credit_used, summed across all time).

elements.title: Last extra-credit grant
elements.tooltip: Most recent extra_credit row in credits_ledger for this user.

elements.title: Custom amount
elements.tooltip: Used by the "Add custom amount" button below. Disabled while ≤ 0.

elements.title: Add 1,000 credits
Add 10,000 credits
Add 100,000 credits
elements.tooltip: POST /_grafana-add-credit?user=${matrix_user_id}&credit=100000. Largest preset — confirm before clicking.

elements.title: Add custom amount
elements.tooltip: POST /_grafana-add-credit with the value of "Custom amount". Disabled while the amount is ≤ 0.

targets.rawSql:
WITH balance AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'plan_allowance' AND s.status = 'active' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END) +
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'plan_allowance_used' AND s.status = 'active' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END) AS remaining_plan_allowance,
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'extra_credit' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END) +
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'extra_credit_used' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END) AS remaining_extra_credit
  FROM users u
  LEFT JOIN credits_ledger c ON c.user_id = u.id
  LEFT JOIN subscription_cycles sc ON sc.id = c.subscription_cycle_id
  LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.id = sc.subscription_id
  WHERE u.matrix_user_id = ${matrix_user_id:sqlstring}
),
last_grant AS (
  SELECT c.credit_amount, c.created_at
    FROM users u
    JOIN credits_ledger c ON c.user_id = u.id
   WHERE u.matrix_user_id = ${matrix_user_id:sqlstring}
     AND c.credit_type = 'extra_credit'
   ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
   LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  ${matrix_user_id:sqlstring} AS user_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT remaining_plan_allowance FROM balance), 0) AS remaining_plan_allowance,
  COALESCE((SELECT remaining_extra_credit FROM balance), 0) AS remaining_extra_credit,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT '+' || credit_amount::TEXT || ' credits at ' || TO_CHAR(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') || ' UTC' FROM last_grant),
    'never'
  ) AS last_extra_credit_grant;

panels.title: Add Extra Credit to ${matrix_user_id}

panels.description: Credit ledger summary for this user.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
    u.matrix_user_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'plan_allowance' AND s.status = 'active' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END) as total_plan_allowance,
    ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'plan_allowance_used' AND s.status = 'active' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END)) as total_plan_allowance_used,
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'plan_allowance' AND s.status = 'active' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END) + 
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'plan_allowance_used' AND s.status = 'active' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END) as remaining_plan_allowance,
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'extra_credit' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END) as total_extra_credit,
    ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'extra_credit_used' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END)) as total_extra_credit_used,
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'extra_credit' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END) + 
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.credit_type = 'extra_credit_used' THEN c.credit_amount ELSE 0 END) as remaining_extra_credit
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN credits_ledger c ON c.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN subscription_cycles sc ON sc.id = c.subscription_cycle_id
LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON s.id = sc.subscription_id
WHERE u.matrix_user_id = ${matrix_user_id:sqlstring}
    AND (c.credit_type IN ('plan_allowance', 'plan_allowance_used', 'extra_credit', 'extra_credit_used') OR c.credit_type IS NULL)
GROUP BY u.matrix_user_id;

panels.title: Boxel Credits

panels.description: Operator action: grant the selected permission level to this user on the chosen realm. POSTs to the realm-server with Authorization: Bearer.
panels.title: Grant Permission

panels.description: Realms this user has access to. Set the Realm and Permission Level above, then click Grant Permission to add or upgrade access.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
  realm_url,
  read,
  write,
  realm_owner,
  CASE
    WHEN realm_owner THEN 'owner'
    WHEN write THEN 'read/write'
    WHEN read THEN 'read'
    ELSE 'none'
  END AS permission
FROM realm_user_permissions
WHERE username = ${matrix_user_id:sqlstring}
ORDER BY realm_owner DESC, write DESC, read DESC, realm_url ASC
LIMIT 500;

panels.title: Realms Accessible to ${matrix_user_id}

list.definition: SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(url, '^https?://', '') AS __text, url AS __value FROM realm_registry WHERE kind IN ('bootstrap', 'source') ORDER BY 1;
list.description: Realm to grant access on (used by the Grant Permission button).
list.label: Realm to grant access on
list.name: grant_realm_url
list.query: SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(url, '^https?://', '') AS __text, url AS __value FROM realm_registry WHERE kind IN ('bootstrap', 'source') ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT CASE WHEN '$permission_level' = 'read_write' THEN 'read/write' ELSE 'read' END AS permission_label;
list.label: permission_label
list.name: permission_label
list.query: SELECT CASE WHEN '$permission_level' = 'read_write' THEN 'read/write' ELSE 'read' END AS permission_label;

list.definition: SELECT CASE WHEN '$permission_level' = 'read_write' THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS write_flag;
list.label: write_flag
list.name: write_flag
list.query: SELECT CASE WHEN '$permission_level' = 'read_write' THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS write_flag;
